levels.body: In Dickens's time, the world had several meanings, but in this context it most likely means "[a] small ornament or fancy article, usually an article of jewellery for personal adornment" ("trinket, n.1.").
worksCited: "trinket, n.1" Def. 2. *OED Online*, OUP. Sep. 2013. Web. 14 Nov. 2013.
